tasks.instruction: This home icon got tinted red by mistake. Restore its default black outline.
Someone changed this heart's color to blue. Set it back to the standard black.
The star is drawn in green here — it should be black. Fix the color.
The sun icon is purple, which is wrong. Restore the default neutral black.
The moon was repainted orange. Put it back to black.
Pink clouds aren't on brand. Reset this icon to its default black outline.
A blue fire icon is wrong. Change it back to black.
The bell looks yellow — that's not its default color. Restore black.
A green envelope: not the default. Make it the usual black again.
This shopping-cart was recolored red by accident. Reset it to black.
The settings cog is cyan here. Restore the default black look.
The user icon is purple. Reset it to its standard black color.
Camera icon is orange — wrong. Restore the original black.
A green phone icon doesn't fit. Change it back to black.
Microphone is pink, which is unintentional. Repaint it black.
The map pin was tinted blue. Restore the default black outline.
A yellow document icon isn't right. Switch it back to black.
Folder was made red by mistake. Restore the standard black.
Bookmark icon is green — wrong color. Reset to black.
The key icon is blue. Put it back to the default black outline.
The home icon is drawn way too thick. Bring it back to the default 1.5 stroke-width.
This heart is painfully thin. Reset to the standard 1.5 stroke-width.
The star's strokes are too heavy. Restore the default 1.5 width.
The sun's lines look anemic. Set the stroke-width back to 1.5.
The cloud is far too bold. Reset stroke-width to 1.5.
Bell is barely visible — its stroke is too thin. Restore 1.5.
Envelope's lines are too thick. Set stroke-width back to the default 1.5.
Camera looks bulky — its stroke is too heavy. Reset to 1.5.
Microphone is washed out from a thin stroke. Restore default 1.5.
User icon is drawn with bold lines. Reset stroke-width to 1.5.
The cog has a hairline stroke. Bump it back to 1.5.
Search icon is too thick. Reset stroke-width to the standard 1.5.
The clock is rendered with very thin lines. Set stroke-width back to 1.5.
Calendar looks too heavy. Restore stroke-width 1.5.
Photo icon is faint — stroke is too thin. Reset to 1.5.
The home icon shrank — it should fill the canvas. Restore it to size 112.
The heart is rendered too large and pushes outside the safe area. Reset to size 112.
Star is too small to read. Scale it back up to 112.
Sun is overflowing the canvas. Shrink it back to size 112.
Bell looks tiny. Restore its proper size of 112.
Envelope is oversized. Bring it back to size 112.
Camera shrank to half its normal size. Reset to 112.
Phone is too big and crowded. Restore it to 112.
Folder is small and lost on the canvas. Scale it up to 112.
Clock is rendered too large. Reset to size 112.
The home icon is being cut off by the canvas. Expand the viewBox so it fits.
Heart is clipped — the canvas is too small. Make the viewBox big enough.
Half the star is missing because the canvas is undersized. Restore the original 128x128 viewBox.
The sun's edges are cut. Resize the canvas back to 128x128.
Cloud is being cropped. Set the viewBox to 128x128 so the whole icon shows.
The bell is clipping out of the canvas. Expand back to 128x128.
Envelope hangs off the bottom. Restore the canvas to 128x128.
Camera is mostly cropped out. Fix the viewBox.
Phone icon's right edge is gone. Expand the viewBox to 128x128.
Folder is being clipped. Restore the original canvas size.
The trash icon was painted brown. Restore the default black look.
An all-gray eye icon looks dimmed. Reset to the default black outline.
The smiley face is bright yellow — the default is plain black. Fix it.
Cyan calendar is wrong. Restore the default black.
Flag icon turned purple by accident. Reset to the standard black outline.
This house has no door. Draw the door back in.
The house is missing its window. Add it back where it should sit on the wall.
Someone removed the chimney from this house. Put it back on the roof.
The doorknob has fallen off. Restore it to the door.
This clock has no hour hand. Draw it back in.
The minute hand is gone. Restore it pointing to its original position.
The pivot dot at the center is missing. Add it back.
The stamp peeled off the envelope. Reattach it.
An urgent-indicator dot used to be here. Add it back.
The address line is missing from the envelope. Restore it.
The notification badge has disappeared. Put it back in the corner.
Bell's ringer is missing. Add it back at the bottom.
The small white dot inside the badge is gone. Restore it.
The tear from the left eye is missing. Draw it back.
Left blush is gone. Restore it.
Right blush has vanished. Add it back.
The crack line on this heart is missing. Put it back.
Cupid's arrow is gone. Restore the arrow line on the heart.
The cart is missing its left wheel. Add it back.
The right wheel fell off the cart. Restore it.
Item-1 is missing from inside the cart. Put it back.
Item-2 has disappeared from the basket. Restore it.
The dot on the map pin is missing. Draw it back.
The bow knot on the gift is gone. Add it back to the top of the package.
The light bulb has no filament. Draw it back inside the bulb.
There's a red dot next to the house that shouldn't be there. Remove it.
Someone tagged the wall with a purple bar. Wipe it off.
A red line was scrawled across the clock face. Get rid of it.
An extra red tick mark appears near 2 o'clock. Remove it.
There's a gray smudge in the bottom right of the envelope. Clean it off.
A small red dot in the top-left corner is unwanted. Remove it.
A blue diagonal scribble appears on the bell. Delete it.
There's an unwanted horizontal line at the bottom. Remove it.
There's an extra dot above the face's eyes that shouldn't be there. Remove it.
A small dot on the cheek looks like an unintentional mark. Erase it.
There's a diagonal strike-through across the heart. Remove it.
A yellow dot in the corner doesn't belong here. Delete it.
A small purple square hovers above the cart. Remove it.
An extra brown handle was added to the cart. Get rid of it.
There's a yellow dot in the corner of the map pin. Remove it.
A red baseline appeared below the gift. Erase it.
There's a gray blob to the right of the flag. Clean it off.
A blue dot below the bulb doesn't belong. Remove it.
A green square is stuck in the corner. Get rid of it.
A short black line appeared in the upper-left. Remove it.
The door has been repainted blue. Restore its original brown color.
Someone painted the window red. Set it back to its original blue.
The chimney is green here — it should be dark brown. Fix it.
The stamp's color is wrong (green). Restore the original red.
Urgent dot is yellow, but it should be the alarming red. Fix it.
The notification badge is blue — it should be red. Repaint it.
The tear-line is green, which is odd. Restore the original blue.
Left blush is blue. Fix it back to its original pink.
The crack line on the heart got recolored red. Set it back to black.
Item-1 inside the cart is the wrong color (red). Restore the original blue.
Item-2 is purple — wrong. Set it back to its original yellow.
The pin-dot was recolored blue. Restore its original red.
The bow knot is green, which is wrong. Repaint it to the original yellow.
The center dot of the cog is blue. Set it back to its original red.
The bulb's halo is blue. Restore the original yellow glow.
The door slid 20px to the right and is now off the wall. Slide it back to its original position.
The window has drifted to the right side of the wall. Restore it to its original position.
The minute hand has rotated up — it should be pointing right. Restore it.
The stamp slid to the left side of the envelope. Move it back to the top-right.
The badge fell down below the bell. Put it back at the top.
The right blush floated up onto the forehead. Slide it back down.
The left wheel rolled off-track. Restore it under the basket.
The ground shadow slid to the right. Center it under the pin again.
The bow knot drifted to the right edge of the gift. Center it back on top.
The pole-tip slid down the pole. Put it back at the very top.
The door has shifted slightly to the right. Nudge it back to its exact original spot.
The window has moved a touch to the left. Restore the precise original position.
The chimney sank a few pixels. Raise it back up.
The doorknob shifted slightly off the door. Restore it.
The tip of the hour hand drifted right. Set it back to its original angle.
The minute hand dropped slightly. Restore it pointing horizontally.
The pivot is just a few pixels off-center. Restore it to the exact center of the clock face.
The stamp slid down a bit. Move it back to its original spot in the top-right.
The urgent dot drifted to the right. Pull it back to its original position.
The address line dropped a few pixels. Restore the original y position.
The ringer is slightly off-center to the left. Restore its alignment under the bell.
The badge slipped a bit down and left. Restore it to its proper corner spot.
The left blush drifted slightly right. Move it back to its original spot.
The right blush drifted slightly left. Restore the exact original position.
The tear has slid down the cheek by a few pixels. Restore it to its starting position.
The left wheel rolled slightly off. Restore it precisely under the cart.
The right wheel rolled out a bit. Restore it under the basket.
Item-1 inside the cart slid sideways. Restore its original position.
The bow knot is slightly off-center. Restore it to the exact center.
The hour-hand's tip sagged downward a few pixels. Restore the original angle.
The little doorknob is blue. Restore the original yellow.
The pivot dot turned blue. Reset to its original red.
The hour hand was recolored red. Set its stroke back to the default black.
The minute hand turned blue. Restore the original black stroke.
The address line is red. Restore the original black stroke.
The ringer is purple. Set it back to the default black.
The badge-count dot is red. Restore the original white center.
The right blush turned green. Restore the original pink.
The arrow on the heart is green. Restore the original brown.
Left wheel was painted blue. Set it back to its default black.
Right wheel is red. Restore its original black.
The shadow is purple, which is wrong. Restore the original near-black shadow.
Left bow is blue. Restore the original red.
Right bow is green. Restore the original red.
Pole-tip is red. Restore the original yellow.
The windline got recolored green. Restore the original blue stroke.
Filament turned blue. Set it back to its default orange.
The center dot is green. Restore the original red.
The rotation arrow turned red. Set its stroke back to the default blue.
The tear-line is purple. Restore the original blue.
The tiny pivot at the center of the clock is gone. Add it back.
The little white center of the badge is missing. Restore it.
The urgent indicator dot is gone. Restore it on the envelope.
The doorknob is missing from the door. Add it back.
The pin lost its ground shadow. Restore it.
The left blush has been removed. Add it back.
The right blush is missing. Restore it.
The center marker on the cog is gone. Put it back.
The rotation arrow has disappeared from the cog. Restore it.
The left bow loop is gone. Add it back.
The right bow loop is missing. Restore it.
The windline on the flag is gone. Add it back to the right of the banner.
The yellow ball on top of the pole is missing. Restore it.
The glow halo around the bulb is missing. Restore it.
Cupid's arrow has been removed. Restore it.
A small gray dot appeared near the bottom-right of the house. Remove it.
An extra small tick mark was added at the 6 position. Remove it.
A small red dot in the middle of the envelope is unwanted. Remove it.
There's an extra small dot next to the ringer. Get rid of it.
There's a tiny dot below the mouth that shouldn't be there. Erase it.
A small yellow speck appeared on the heart. Remove it.
A gray pebble appeared under the cart. Clean it off.
An extra small red square appeared on the pin's stem. Delete it.
There's a scratch line on the gift box. Remove it.
A tiny dot appeared near the bottom of the pole. Remove it.
A horizontal line was drawn across the bulb. Erase it.
There's a small extra dot at the cog's right edge. Remove it.
A gray smoke speck above the chimney shouldn't be there. Clean it up.
A small red speck appeared near the address. Remove it.
A small dot near the right side of the mouth shouldn't be there. Erase it.
This house has two doors of identical color. Remove the duplicate.
There are two windows where there should be one. Delete the duplicate.
Two hour hands point from the center. Remove the duplicate.
There are two stamps on the envelope. Remove the extra one.
Two notification badges appear on the bell. Delete the duplicate.
There are two left-side blushes. Get rid of the duplicate.
Item-1 has been duplicated inside the cart. Remove the copy.
Two bow knots sit on top of the gift. Remove the duplicate.
Two dots are on the head of the pin. Delete the duplicate.
There are two center dots on the cog. Get rid of the duplicate.
Two things are wrong with this house: the door is missing AND the window is the wrong color. Fix both.
The chimney sagged AND there's a stray red dot next to the house. Repair both defects.
The clock has lost both its hands. Restore them to point to their original positions.
Both clock hands have drifted slightly. Restore each to its original angle.
The stamp is missing AND the urgent dot was recolored yellow. Fix both.
The badge has shifted down-left AND its inner dot is the wrong color. Restore both.
Two things are missing from the face: the tear AND the left blush. Add both back.
Both blushes turned green. Restore them to their original pink.
The crack line is missing AND the arrow is the wrong color. Repair both.
The left wheel is gone AND the right wheel rolled out of place. Fix both.
Both items in the cart turned purple. Restore each to its original color.
The pin-dot was recolored AND the shadow drifted. Restore both.
Both side bows are missing from the gift. Restore them.
The bulb's halo is gone AND the filament's stroke is the wrong color. Fix both.
The center dot drifted slightly AND the rotation arrow is the wrong color. Repair both.
The crack line has been mirrored. Flip it back to its original orientation.
The tear line was reversed. Restore the original direction.
The hour hand's stroke has been horizontally mirrored. Flip it back.
The minute hand was reversed. Restore its original direction.
The address line is mirrored. Restore it.
The windline has been horizontally reversed. Flip it back.
The filament zigzag was mirrored. Restore the original direction.
The rotation arrow points the wrong way. Mirror it back.
The tear was mirrored — its hook points the wrong way. Flip it back.
The arrow line on the heart was reversed. Restore the original direction.
The ringer (a single dot) wasn't actually flippable — author note: the polygon was reversed elsewhere; restore everything to the clean state.
The address line is reversed left-to-right. Flip it back.
Minute hand got mirrored. Restore its original orientation.
The cog's rotation arrow has been mirrored. Flip it back to point the original way.
The wind-indicator polyline is reversed. Restore the original orientation.
The door is just 3px off to the right. Restore the exact original position.
The window has sunk a few pixels. Restore the precise original y.
The doorknob is 2px to the left of where it should be. Fix it.
The chimney slid 4px to the right. Restore the original alignment.
The hour hand's tip is barely off — 3px right. Restore it exactly.
The pivot is 2px off from center. Restore it to the exact center of the face.
The urgent dot is 3px off to the right. Restore it.
The stamp dropped 3px. Move it back to its precise position.
The badge is 3px to the left of its intended spot. Fix it.
Left blush is 3px to the right. Restore the precise original position.
Left wheel is 3px off-track. Restore it.
The pin-dot dropped a few pixels. Restore it.
The bow knot is 3px off-center. Restore it.
The pole-tip slipped 4px down. Restore it to the very top.
The center dot is 2px off-center. Fix it.
The door is a slightly wrong shade of brown. Restore the original #6a3819.
The window's blue tint is wrong. Restore the original #94c8ff.
The chimney's brown is too dark. Restore the original #603020.
The pivot's red is slightly off. Restore the exact #e63946.
The stamp's red drifted. Restore the exact original red (#e63946).
The notification badge red is a tone off. Restore the exact #e63946.
The left blush pink is slightly off. Restore the exact #fda4af.
Right blush pink is slightly off. Restore the exact #fda4af.
The crack line's black is slightly darker than the spec. Restore the exact #222.
Item-1's blue is slightly off. Restore the exact #3b82f6.
Item-2's yellow is a tone off. Restore the exact #fde047.
The bow knot yellow is slightly off. Restore the exact #fde047.
Pole-tip yellow is slightly off. Restore the exact #fde047.
The filament's orange is a touch off. Restore the exact #f97316.
The center dot's red is slightly off. Restore the exact #e63946.
Three things are wrong with this house: the door is missing, the window is the wrong color, AND the chimney has sagged. Fix all three.
Three issues: doorknob is gone, window has shifted right, AND there's a stray green dot in the corner. Repair them all.
The clock has three problems: hour hand missing, pivot is green, and minute hand dropped slightly. Restore the clean state.
All three clock parts have drifted by small amounts. Restore each to its precise original position.
Three problems on the envelope: stamp missing, address line missing, urgent dot is blue. Fix them all.
The bell has lost its badge and the inner dot, and the ringer has drifted left. Restore the clean state.
Three things wrong: tear missing, left blush is blue, right blush is green. Fix everything.
Crack and arrow gone, AND the heart outline got tinted blue. Restore the original state completely.
The cart has three problems: missing left wheel, missing item-1, and item-2 is the wrong color. Fix them all.
Three issues on the pin: pin-dot is green, shadow shifted right, AND there's an extra yellow dot in the corner. Repair them all.
The gift's bows are gone (both sides) and the knot dropped slightly. Restore the clean state.
Pole-tip missing, windline recolored red AND shifted right. Restore the entire scene.
The bulb has no halo or filament, AND the base icon is yellow instead of black. Restore everything.
Three issues on the cog: center-dot drifted, rotation arrow is green, AND there's a small scratch in the corner. Fix all of them.
The chimney was flipped, the window was duplicated, AND the door is the wrong color. Restore the clean state.
Two parts of the house have drifted by 3px in opposite directions. Detect and fix both.
The hour hand dropped 3px AND the pivot's red is slightly off. Restore both precisely.
Both decorative parts have shifted slightly. Detect and restore each.
The badge drifted slightly AND the inner dot's white is a hair off. Restore both.
Both blushes drifted inward by 3px. Restore each to its original outer position.
Both wheels drifted slightly inward. Restore each to its original outer position.
The pin-dot slipped 2px AND its red is slightly off. Restore the exact original position and color.
Both bows drifted slightly outward. Restore each to the original inner position.
Pole-tip and windline have both shifted by small amounts. Restore both.
The center-dot is 2px off AND the rotation arrow's blue is slightly wrong. Restore both precisely.
The home base icon is wrongly tinted blue AND the canvas is clipping the icon. Restore both.
The clock outline is red AND the canvas is too small. Repair the color and expand the viewBox.
The bell outline is green AND the canvas is way too small. Restore the original colors and viewBox.
The envelope outline is purple AND part of it is cropped. Restore both.
The heart base is yellow AND the canvas is clipping it. Restore the original color and expand the viewBox.
